summary: Implemented seven-gate funnel orchestrator for Field Monitor. Gates: URL Validation → Rate Check → Fetch → Parse → Change Detection → State Update → Log. Added service bindings (FETCHER, PARSER, PROXY) to wrangler.toml. Created orchestrator-contract.ts with CheckTask, GateResult, CheckResult types. Updated shared barrel. Supports POST /check (single), POST /batch (multiple), and scheduled handler.

verification.gate_flow: Each gate must pass before next executes; failure records gate_reached and stops funnel
